testCases.name: test_case_0
testCases.input: What are the programming languages known by this person?
testCases.actualOutput: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, SQL, HTML5, CSS3.
testCases.expectedOutput: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, SQL, HTML5, CSS3
retrievalContext:
Dinesh Maharana
Bhubaneswar, India
Ó +91-63729 23522 R dineshmaharana13@gmail.com ° dinesh-maharana  Dev-Dinesh10  Portfolio
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, SQL, HTML5, CSS3
Frameworks & Libraries: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, React Native, Tailwind CSS, Chart.js, Recharts
Databases & Cloud: MongoDB, REST API, Vector Databases, JWT Authentication
Developer Tools: VS Code, Git, GitHub, Expo CLI, Postman, Thunder Client
Concepts: MVC Architecture, RAG Pipeline, State Management, Agile, CI/CD, API Integration
EXPERIENCE
ITPlusPoint Aug 2024 – Present
Software Trainee – React Native Developer Bhubaneswar, India
• Developed and deployed cross-platform Android mobile applications using React Native with modular, reusable
component architecture to enhance code maintainability and scalability.
• Integrated RESTful APIs with centralized state management via Context API, implementing asynchronous data
handling for seamless real-time user experiences.
• Identified and resolved critical performance bottlenecks, reducing application crash rates and improving UI render
efficiency across multiple device profiles.
ITPlusPoint Jun 2024 – Aug 2024
Web Development Intern Bhubaneswar, India
• Built and deployed a full-scale Asset Management System using the MERN stack with role-based access control
(RBAC), enabling secure multi-user operations.
• Implemented end-to-end modules for asset lifecycle tracking, vendor management, assignment workflows, and
maintenance audit logging to support enterprise-level operations.
• Developed interactive analytics dashboards using Chart.js and delivered a fully responsive, accessible UI with
Tailwind CSS across all device breakpoints.
PROJECTS
AI Chatbot with RAG Pipeline Mar 2026
• Architected a production-grade full-stack AI chatbot using Gemini AI with real-time streaming responses,
context-aware conversation management, and multi-session support.
• Engineered a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline supporting PDF and URL ingestion, Voyage AI
embeddings, and cosine similarity-based semantic retrieval for grounded LLM responses.
• Designed and secured JWT-authenticated RESTful APIs supporting multi-threaded chat sessions, document
lifecycle management, persistent conversation history, and chat export functionality.
• Built an analytics dashboard using Recharts to visualize token consumption, message throughput, and active thread
metrics in real time.
Contact Management System – Backend Mar 2025
• Architected scalable RESTful APIs following the MVC design pattern with clean separation of concerns across
routes, controllers, and data models.
• Implemented stateless JWT-based authentication with secure credential storage using bcrypt hashing and
configurable salt rounds for enhanced security.
• Developed a modular middleware pipeline for request validation, centralized error handling, and protected route
authorization to ensure robust API security.
• Executed comprehensive API testing across all endpoints using Thunder Client, covering positive flows, edge cases,
and failure scenarios to ensure production reliability.
Prompt-to-Image Generator 2025
• Built an AI-powered image generation platform that translates natural language prompts into high-fidelity visuals
using a third-party Generative AI API.
• Developed a scalable Node.js backend with prompt sanitization, API orchestration, rate limiting, and structured error
recovery for production stability.
• Optimized frontend rendering performance with real-time loading state management, responsive layout design, and
cross-device input validation for consistent UX.
EDUCATION
Parala Maharaj Engineering College Dec 2020 – May 2024
Bachelor of Technology – Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering | 73% Berhampur, India
Sri Chaitanya Techno School Aug 2017 – Jul 2019
Senior Secondary Education (PCM) | 60% Visakhapatnam, India
CERTIFICATIONS
• Oracle Cloud Infrastructure – Generative AI Professional
• Oracle Database – AI Vector Search Professional
• MERN Stack Development – Course Completion Certificate, JSpiders
